历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 6836 → 9666 → 8769 → 15690 → 10452. In 2024, due to the Chinese-foreign cooperative education program in the A1 segment of the first batch, there was a significant backward shift in ranking, which returned to 10452 in 2025. The fluctuation range has been large in the past 3 years, with the 2025 baseline around 10452. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 64 in 2021 → 66 in 2022 → 72 in 2023 → 76 in 2024 → 80 in 2025, showing a continuous slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 75, a decrease of 5 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 6.25%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 51st in 2026 (2021: 56th → 2022: 57th → 2023: 62nd → 2024: 57th → 2025: 56th → 2026: 51st), with a continuous recovery in ranking, indicating recognition of the university's comprehensive strength. In 2023, the reputation was slightly negative (the ranking of minor language majors dropped by 6211 places), but there have been no obvious negative public opinions in recent years. On Douyin, it ranks 21st in overall popularity, rated as "relatively hot", with a comprehensive popularity of about 2.43 million, and medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms. The abnormal signal in 2023 enrollment was low attention, with limited impact. It has A+ in Aquaculture, A+ in Marine Science, A- in Biology, and A- in Food Science and Engineering. Marine and aquaculture disciplines are top in the country, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended hot majors, while characteristic majors like Marine Science and Food Science and Engineering have stable popularity. In 2026, there are 167,419 Physics Category examinees in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university in the province, with a recruitment proportion of about 4.7% (2025) in Shanxi, which is moderate. Qingdao has strong urban appeal, providing a certain regional preference bonus for Shanxi examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 10452, a slight reduction of 5 places in the 2026 plan (slightly intensified competition), the Soft Science ranking rising to 51st (increased attractiveness), and a decrease of about 3.4% in provincial Physics Category examinees (slightly eased competition), combined with the slight increase in application popularity due to the ranking rise, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 10090, with a range of 9590–10590.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Cyberspace Security, Software Engineering, etc.)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems)
- Marine Science (with Basic Disciplinary Top Talent Training Plan 2.0 Base)
- Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Atmospheric Science
- Pharmacy
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Food Science and Engineering (including Food Science and Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health)
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Exploration Technology and Engineering
- Logistics Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9590–10590, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (<9590), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Marine Science. If your ranking is close to the lower limit (>10590), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors and accept adjustment, then transfer to your desired direction through major change or minor programs after enrollment.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan

The 2026 plan is 25, a substantial increase of 13 (+108%) compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 51st (2021: 56th → 2022: 57th → 2023: 62nd → 2024: 57th → 2025: 56th → 2026: 51st), with rankings continuously recovering, and the university's comprehensive strength gaining recognition. In 2023, reputation was slightly negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 places in rankings), but there have been no significant negative public opinions in recent years. Douyin popularity total ranking 21st, rated "relatively hot", comprehensive popularity approximately 2.43 million. The 2023 abnormal admission signal was low attention, with limited impact. Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with marine and fisheries disciplines top in the country. History Category enrollment majors mainly focus on economics, management, literature, and law, with average relevance to the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially hot to recommended; Accounting popularity is divided with wait-and-see attitude. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university, with a relatively small proportion of History Category enrollment in Shanxi. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1216, the substantial expansion of 13 places in the 2026 plan (+108%, significantly easing competition), the reduction of provincial History Category candidates by approximately 25.6% (markedly weakening competition), and the rise in Soft Science rankings (enhanced attractiveness), given the extremely large expansion and significant decrease in candidate numbers, the ranking should be lower. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 1976, with a range of 1620–2332.
